channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: John Thune, Known for 'Failure Is Not an Option,' Fails on Election Integrity
item.description: The debate over the SAVE America Act was orchestrated, with Thune playing a key role in what critics call a staged performance.

item.title: New York Enters the Redistricting Wars
item.description: The path to a new gerrymandered map may be more difficult than state Democrats would hope.

item.title: Washington Post Worries Illegals Might Pay Their Own Legal Fees, While Immigration Costs Americans Billions
item.description: The Washington Post this week is drawing attention to women whose illegal alien husbands have been detained, thus leaving them to care for their child...

item.title: CIA suppressed conclusion that COVID came from Chinese lab: Whistleblower
item.description: CIA scientists came to believe that the coronavirus that brought the world to its knees was likely leaked from a Chinese lab, but agency higher-ups --...
